mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, c.name AS courseName, th.name AS teacherName, cr.name AS classroomName, t.schedule_id AS scheduleId, t.media_type AS mediaType, t.status, t.file_id AS fileId, f.original_name AS fileName, f.file_url AS fileUrl, t.attendance_count AS attendanceCount, t.total_score AS totalScore, t.retry_count AS retryCount, t.fail_reason AS failReason, t.created_at AS createdAt, t.start_time AS startTime, t.finish_time AS finishTime, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, t.start_time, t.finish_time) AS durationSeconds FROM analysis_task t LEFT JOIN course_schedule cs ON t.schedule_id = cs.id LEFT JOIN course c ON cs.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN classroom cr ON cs.classroom_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN teacher th ON t.teacher_id = th.id LEFT JOIN sys_file f ON t.file_id = f.id WHERE t.id = #{taskId}
AND t.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
